race.comment: SARA'S ROCKET (7) was an ultra-impressive winner over this route when last seen, relishing the soft 7 conditions there to lead throughout and put 4.5 lengths on her nearest rival. She draws wide here but can roll forward and measure up to these as well. RUSSIAN RONI (3) is another off a win, scoring under 60kg at Kilmore in a strong effort on speed. He draws low and should take catching. SCALABLE (9) was well below her best second up at Sale but had been very good fresh at Pakenham and is suited this level if she can find her best. COUNT OF TOULOUSE (4) can mix his form but is going okay and can figure each-way.
